response.justification: The candidate is an accomplished full-stack software craftsman with strong web, mobile, and embedded experience, but the role requires deep specialization in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, and deep neural network workload analysis. The resume shows no evidence of GPU architecture work, SIMD/MIMD experience, hardware-software co-design, or performance analysis at the silicon level. The brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments and DLang low-latency work do not approach the hardware architecture expertise required for a Principal Performance Architect position.
strengths: Strong software engineering breadth across multiple languages and stacks
Some low-latency systems experience at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Brief C/C++ background at National Instruments
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling or hardware architecture experience
No AI accelerator, GPU architecture, or deep learning optimization background
No PhD/MS in relevant field and lacks principal-level hardware specialization

key_factors.factor: No AI accelerator or DNN optimization experience
